creator: buckshot70@my-deja.com
text:
After changing the security level to "high" using /stand/sysinstall,
the following error is given when trying to start KDE 1.1.2:

Fatal server error:  xf86OpenConsole: KDENABIO failed (operation not permitted)

Fix: 

Edit /etc/rc.conf and set kern_securelevel_enable="NO"
How-To-Repeat: Install KDE 1.1.2, use /stand/sysinstall to set security level to
"high," and startx.
